a:r.a:t: Work Hours Overlap between India & US:
between the Onshore and Offshore teams. This facilitates a
between the India workforce and their counterparts in US (Photon or Client ) for project tasks, dependencies, and other deliverables during daily scrum calls. The overlap also provides
CATCH UP ON COMMUNICATION FROM ONSITE & TASK PLANNING/ALLOCATION
DAILY SCRUM CALL WITH FULL TEAM
TASK EXECUTION / DEEP DIVE SESSIONS / JIRA UPDATES
SUMMARIZATION OF DAY'S PERFORMANCE, BLOCKERS/DEPENDENCIES, ETC.
CONNECT WITH ONSITE AS REQUIRED ON CRITICAL ISSUES
SUMMARIZATION OF DAY'S PERFORMANCE, BLOCKERS/DEPENDENCIES, ETC.
